message:
bench(action): add Criterion benchmarks for recovery tree and session tracking (process_triage-dki.16)

7 benchmark groups, 57 scenarios covering RecoveryTreeDatabase
(construction/lookup/sweep), RequirementContext (is_met/all_met),
RecoverySession (creation/recording/budget/category counts),
RecoveryExecutor (find_alternatives/classify_failure/generate_hint).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -160,6 +160,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "inference_advanced"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "recovery_tree"
+harness = false
+
 [[test]]
 name = "fleet_integration"
 path = "tests/fleet_integration.rs"
